pages.text:
April 16, 2026
Robert Ferrara
Vesper Holdings
595 Madison Avenue, 37th Floor
New York, NY 10022
RE: Loss information for Campus Quarters, located at 1773 Ennis Joslin Rd, Corpus Christi, TX 78412.
Dear Robert:
In regard to the location referenced above, after review of the currently valued Property & Casualty loss
Runs, we can confirm that the following losses have occurred from 4/16/2023 to the current date of this
letter.
General Liability
No known losses reported.
Property
No known losses reported.
Please advise if you should have any questions or need anything further.
Sincerely,
Amy Green
Amy Green, CRM, CIC
Senior Vice President
Marsh USA, Inc.
